prompt: A haunting, cinematic close-up within a vast, ancient library. Intricate, gold-embossed leather book spines representing world languages are physically disintegrating into fine, pale sand. The sand pours through the wooden shelves like a broken hourglass, burying the floor in high mounds of featureless dust. Deep chiaroscuro lighting with a single warm light beam hitting the falling particles. Hyper-realistic textures of decaying paper, weathered leather, and grit. No text, no charts, no people. 8k resolution, wide-angle perspective.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Every two weeks, a language disappears completely, taking with it an entire cultural heritage and unique worldview.
concept: Language Extinction as an irreversible loss of human data.
metaphor: An ancient library acting as an hourglass where the books dissolve into anonymous sand.
